title: Department Manager Vacancy at Borosil - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Borosil - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Borosil are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
